description: Bucketed MaxJitter by Site for calls with maxJitter>10ms
report: search?q=search `mediastream_events` | search MaxJitter>10 | eval MaxJitter%3Dmin(MaxJitter%2C2001) | bin MaxJitter span%3D50 | stats last(SiteName) as SiteName count by MaxJitter | sort Max_Jitter | eval JitterStart%3Dmvindex(split(MaxJitter%2C"-")%2C0) | makecontinuous JitterStart span%3D50 | eval JitterEnd %3D JitterStart %2B 50 | eval MaxJitter%3DJitterStart%2B "-" %2B JitterEnd | eval Max_Jitter%3Dif(Max_Jitter%3D%3D"1000-1050"%2C"1000%2B"%2CMax_Jitter) | chart sum(count) as count over SiteName by MaxJitter&display.general.type=statistics&display.visualizations.charting.chart=column&earliest=-30d&latest=now

report: search?q=search `cdr_events` ConfName%3D* |  timechart count by ConfName limit%3D20&display.general.type=visualizations&display.visualizations.charting.chart=column&earliest=-30d%40d&latest=now&display.visualizations.charting.chart.stackMode=stacked

description: Top destinations of outbound long distance calls
report: search?q=search `cdr_events` LongDistance%3D"1" Direction%3D"outbound" | `get_locations` | stats dc(Extension) as Extensions sum(CallDuration) as CallDuration count as calls by to | sort - calls | eval CallDuration%3Dtostring(CallDuration%2C"duration")&display.general.type=statistics&display.visualizations.charting.chart=column&earliest=-30d%40d&latest=now&display.visualizations.charting.chart.stackMode=stacked&sid=1406070865.662

description: Inbound call counts and durations outside of business hours.
report: search?q=search `cdr_events` Direction%3D"inbound" (hour_of_day<8 OR hour_of_day>18 OR day_of_week%3D"saturday" OR day_of_week%3D"sunday") | `get_locations` | stats dc(Extension) as Extensions sum(CallDuration) as CallDuration count as calls by to | sort - calls | eval CallDuration%3Dtostring(CallDuration%2C"duration")&display.general.type=statistics&display.visualizations.charting.chart=column&display.visualizations.charting.chart.stackMode=stacked&earliest=-30d&latest=now
